name: Carbon
description: Sleek developer-tool aesthetic with neutral-cool grays and soft muted blue accents. Smooth animations without bounce, shadcn/Tailwind 4 visual language.

decorators.carbon-canvas: Background color using theme background token. Clean, minimal foundation.
decorators.carbon-glass: Subtle surface elevation with 1px border, no blur. Uses surface background.
decorators.carbon-input: Soft border with gentle focus ring using primary blue. Border transitions on focus.
decorators.carbon-card: Surface background, subtle border, 8px radius, hover shadow transition.
decorators.carbon-code: Monospace font, surface-raised background, subtle 3px left border accent in primary color.
decorators.carbon-bubble-user: Right-aligned message bubble with primary-tinted background for user messages.
decorators.carbon-bubble-ai: Left-aligned message bubble with surface background for AI responses.
decorators.carbon-fade-slide: Entrance animation: opacity 0 to 1, translateY 12px to 0, 200ms ease-out.
decorators.carbon-skeleton: Loading placeholder with subtle pulse animation for skeleton states.

chat.description: Chat interface with conversation list sidebar and message thread. Anchored input at bottom.

auth.description: Centered auth forms with clean card styling.

marketing.description: Marketing pages with top nav and footer. Clean sections with subtle separators.
